_comment: Declarative column-kit lifecycle governance matrix. Keep schema behavior truth here so CI can enforce mutable vs append-only expectations.

rules.reason: Immutable request audit trail.
Domain event stream is insert-only.
Status history is append-only.
Domain event log table is append-only.
Invariant log table is append-only.
Truth decision locks are immutable snapshots on a binding.
Accounting projection decisions are append-only audit artifacts.
Append-only resolution lifecycle log (occurred_at anchors row time).
Append-only compliance trail; no actor column by design.
Append-only pricing truth rows anchored on locked_at; no actor column by design.
Composite-key AR/AP projection without standard tenant lifecycle mixins.
Global subscription status catalog without tenant-scoped lifecycle columns.
Chart of accounts rows are maintained over time (soft-delete via deleted_at).
Explicit mutable onboarding; review when lifecycle semantics change.

Naming convention marks immutable event/history tables.
Sales tables: timestamps + actor audit IDs; soft-delete (deleted_at) is optional per table. appendOnly/readModel overrides appear earlier.
